mission.objective: Research dependency and architecture path for the Personal Performance OS POC.

forbidden_scope: Factory V2 usage of any kind
App source code, scaffolding, or dependency manifests
Garmin credentials, real account login, API calls, or data retrieval
Telegram bot creation, tokens, webhook setup, or live Telegram traffic
Hermes installation, configuration, execution, or operational use
Public deployment, production infrastructure, cloud storage, telemetry, analytics, authentication, or payment setup
allowed_commands: Public web search and source review through Codex browsing tools for research only

commands_run: Codex web research and source review for Garmin, Telegram, SQLite, DuckDB, PostgreSQL, open-source Garmin clients, and Hermes

verification.summary: Research evidence was recorded, Mission 002 record parses, and V3-only/dependency constraints were maintained.

operator_friction_notes: Official Garmin access may require program approval and possible commercial terms.
Manual export/import is lower risk but less automated.
Garmin access matrix recommends synthetic-first for the POC, manual export/import as the first real-data bridge, and official APIs as the long-term automation target.
Synthetic-first should be formalized as a Digital Twin User fixture strategy, not arbitrary demo data.

Pre-mortem risks should be mitigated through golden fixtures covering fatigue, sleep, nutrition, weight, missing data, contradictory metrics, duplicate imports, timezone boundaries, and non-diagnostic health handling.

Perplexity's Search as Code article was used as an architectural analogy for compiling human intent into bounded executable workflows over composable primitives; search is treated as the demonstration domain, not the core insight.
Conversation and intent state should persist across Telegram and desktop web surfaces; surfaces are adapters over shared conversation, intent, evidence, workflow, and memory records.
Text and voice should normalize into the same intent pipeline, with voice transcription and artifact retention requiring later dependency and privacy approval.

Image uploads should also normalize into the intent pipeline; nutrition-label capture should preserve source provenance, extracted fields, confidence, units, quantity ambiguity, correction flow, and retention rules.
Telegram live operation needs a later bot/token handling mission.
